title: taraxacum expansum
intro: Taraxacum expansum, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion genus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve liver and gallbladder issues, and act as a diuretic. The plant is rich in vitamins and minerals, offering various health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving blood circulation, and supporting the immune system. Taraxacum expansum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
